title: Bloodline PvP
description: An aggressive dark red PvP resource pack featuring a transparent GUI, compact short swords, a custom totem, and crisp tactical audio for ultimate combat performance.
body:
# 🩸 Bloodline PvP — Dominate with Style

**Bloodline PvP** is an aggressive, aesthetic, and highly optimized dark red resource pack tailored for competitive Minecraft players. It strips away visual clutter, enhances game performance, introduces crystal-clear interfaces, and delivers satisfying custom audio feedback to give you the ultimate edge in battle.

---

## ✨ Key Features

* **👁️ Transparent GUI (Clear Vision):** Completely see-through textures for your inventory, chests, and crafting menus. Never lose track of your surroundings or approaching enemies while managing your gear or sipping potions mid-fight.
* **⚔️ Compact Short Swords:** Custom-designed swords shrunk to a sleek, tactical size. They occupy significantly less screen space, granting you maximum visibility and situational awareness during intense combos.
* **🎭 Crimson Totem:** A beautifully redesigned Totem of Undying that perfectly matches the dark, bloody aesthetic of the pack.
* **🎧 Tactical Custom Audio:** Fully overhauled sound effects designed to improve your auditory awareness and gameplay responsiveness:
  * Crisp, punchy block-breaking sound cues.
  * Clean, non-intrusive audio for eating food and drinking potions.
  * A loud, epic, and unmistakable custom sound for totem pops.

---

## 📊 Feature Breakdown

| Category | What's Changed | Gameplay Impact |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Interface** | Transparent HUD, minimalist hotbar borders, custom crosshair | Maximum focus on your target |
| **Weapons & Items** | Short swords, unique Totem model, dark red themed gear | Unobstructed view during attacks |
| **Environment** | Clean, reworked block-breaking sounds | Less noise pollution, better concentration |
| **Effects Audio** | Reworked audio for potions, food, and totem pops | Perfect control over combat timings |
